description_long: This object is a small, leafless tree with a thin, straight trunk and several slender branches radiating outward in all directions. The branches are sparsely distributed and appear to be bare, with no visible foliage or buds. The coloration is predominantly a pale pinkish hue, giving the tree a delicate and almost ethereal appearance. The structure is symmetrical, with branches extending evenly from the central trunk, creating a starburst-like silhouette. The overall form is compact and minimal, suggesting a young or possibly ornamental tree, suitable for urban landscaping or decorative use. No visible roots or additional features are present at the base.
description: A small, bare tree with a thin trunk and radiating pinkish branches, forming a symmetrical, starburst shape.
description_view_0: The tree is seen head-on, showing the symmetrical spread of its thin, pinkish branches radiating from the center.
description_view_1: This view highlights the even distribution of branches, with a slight shift in perspective revealing more of the left side.
description_view_2: The tree appears similar to view 0, with the branches maintaining their radial symmetry and delicate appearance.
description_view_3: From this angle, the right side of the tree is more prominent, but the overall starburst pattern remains clear.
